subject: Re: M Crashes during species creation
body:
If your boxsize is verge large, M will report error. I have used a box size 
and failed in DeNoise, then I use "relion_image_handler" to create a 
smaller model and it works. Please try. 

在2021年2月23日星期二 UTC+8 上午3:18:02<bencr...@gmail.com> 写道：

> Hello, 
>
> I am trying to import a species into M that I have exported from Warp and 
> refined in Relion. When I try to create the species using a Relion star 
> file M crashes and gives this error: 
>
> System.NullReferenceException: Object reference not set to an instance of 
> an object.
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
> 301
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in 
> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 290
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Dispose() in D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 
> 301
>    at Warp.NoiseNet3D.Finalize() in 
> D:\Dev\warp2\WarpLib\NoiseNet3D.cs:line 290
>
> Do you have any ideas what I may be doing wrong?
>
> Thanks,
> Ben
>
